steps.title: Express 89% of the height algebraically
steps.content: When we say the base is 89% of the height, this means base = 89% $\times$ $h$. We need to convert the percentage to decimal form.

steps.title: Convert percentage to decimal
steps.content:
$$89\% = \frac{89}{100} = 0.89$$
Therefore, the base length is $0.89h$. That confirms D is correct.
